apierror-discussiontools-commentname-amb: Faallooyin badan oo leh magaca '$1' ayaa la helay, <var>commentid</var> waa loo baahan yahay.
apierror-discussiontools-findcomment-pag: Boggan waligiis kuma jirin wax dood ah.
apierror-discussiontools-formtoken-used: Faallada hore ayaa loo dhajiyay. Dib u cusboonaysii bogga si aad u aragto.
apierror-discussiontools-subscription-fa: Lama ka bixi karin is-diiwaangelinta mawduucan.
apihelp-discussiontoolscompare-summary: Hel macluumaad ku saabsan isbeddellada faallooyinka ee u dhexeeya laba nuqul oo bog ah.
apihelp-discussiontoolsedit-param-commen: Aqoonsiga faallada lagu jawaabayo. Waxa kaliya la isticmaalaa marka <var>paction</var> uu yahay <var>addcomment</var>. Wuxuu ka hormaraa <var>commentname</var>.
Magaca faallada lagu jawaabayo. Waxa kaliya la isticmaalaa marka <var>paction</var> uu yahay <var>addcomment</var>.
apihelp-discussiontoolsedit-param-autosu: Si toos ah ma u is-diiwaangeliyaa isticmaalaha mawduuca bogga wadahadalka?
apihelp-discussiontoolsedit-param-formto: Aqoonsi gaar ah oo ikhtiyaari ah oo laga soo saaro dhinaca macmiilka si looga hortago in laba jeer la soo dhajiyo.
apihelp-discussiontoolsedit-param-html: Nuxurka la doonayo in la dhajiyo, oo ah HTML. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaantaana <var>wikitext</var>.
apihelp-discussiontoolsedit-param-sectio: {{int:apihelp-edit-param-sectiontitle}} Waxa kaliya la isticmaalaa marka <var>paction</var> uu yahay <var>ku dar mowduuc</var>.
apihelp-discussiontoolsedit-param-allown: Oggolow in la soo dhajiyo qayb cusub oo aan cinwaan lahayn.
apihelp-discussiontoolsedit-param-wikite: Nuxurka la doonayo in la dhajiyo, oo ah wikitext. Lama adeegsan karo isla mar ahaantaana <var>html</var>.
apihelp-discussiontoolsedit-paramvalue-p: Ku dar faallo cusub oo jawaab u ah faallo hore.
Ku dar qayb cusub oo dood ah iyo faallada ugu horreysa ee ku jirta.
apihelp-discussiontoolsfindcomment-summa: Raadi faallo adigoo adeegsanaya aqoonsigeeda ama magaceeda.
apihelp-discussiontoolsfindcomment-param: Bogga uu mar ka jiray hash-ka cinwaanka
apihelp-discussiontoolsgetsubscriptions-: Hel xaaladaha is-diiwaangelinta ee mawduucyada la bixiyay.
apihelp-discussiontoolspageinfo-param-ol: Lambarka nuqulka la adeegsanayo (caadi ahaan waa nuqulka ugu dambeeya).
apihelp-discussiontoolspageinfo-param-pr: Astaamaha la doonayo in la helo:
apihelp-discussiontoolspageinfo-param-ex: Ka saar saxiixyada isticmaalaha faallooyinka (marka la isticmaalayo <var>prop=threaditemshtml</var>).
apihelp-discussiontoolspageinfo-paramval: Matalaadda mawduucyada faallooyinka ee laga soo falanqeeyay bogga
Bogagga kale ee faallooyinkooda laga soo gudbiyay
apihelp-discussiontoolspageinfo-summary: Waxay soo celisaa xogta meta ah ee loo baahan yahay si loo bilaabo Qalabka doodda.
apihelp-discussiontoolspreview-param-typ: Nooca fariinta la doonayo in la eego horudhaceeda
apihelp-discussiontoolspreview-param-wik: Nuxurka la doonayo in la eego horudhaceeda, oo ah wikitext.
apihelp-discussiontoolspreview-summary: Eeg horudhac fariin ku saabsan bogga wadahadalka.
apihelp-discussiontoolssubscribe-param-c: Magaca mawduuca la doonayo in la is-diiwaangeliyo (ama laga baxo is-diiwaangelinta)
apihelp-discussiontoolssubscribe-param-s: Run si aad isu-diiwaangeliso, been si aad uga baxdo is-diiwaangelinta
apihelp-discussiontoolssubscribe-summary: Is-diiwaangeli (ama ka bax is-diiwaangelinta) si aad u hesho ogeysiisyo ku saabsan mawduuc.
apihelp-discussiontoolsthank-summary: Dir ogeysiis mahadcelin dadweyne oo loogu talagalay faallo.
